name: mdy-daf-companion-runtime
description: Runtime for the MDY Daf Companion Claude Code plugin.

scripts.package:companion: npm run build && electron-packager desktop/electron mdy-daf-companion --out=out --overwrite --executable-name=mdy-daf-companion
scripts.package:companion:win: npm run build && electron-packager desktop/electron mdy-daf-companion --platform=win32 --arch=x64 --out=out --overwrite --executable-name=mdy-daf-companion
scripts.package:companion:mac: npm run build && electron-packager desktop/electron mdy-daf-companion --platform=darwin --arch=arm64,x64 --out=out --overwrite --executable-name=mdy-daf-companion
scripts.package:companion:linux: npm run build && electron-packager desktop/electron mdy-daf-companion --platform=linux --arch=x64 --out=out --overwrite --executable-name=mdy-daf-companion
scripts.check: npm run test && npm run validate:plugin && npm run smoke
